subcodes.first_line: Praise be to the Self-Subsisting Lord, and to the Best-Beloved, and to Him Who is the Most Desired One, worthy and befitting it is [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد حضرت قیومی را و حضرت محبوبی را و حضرت مقصودیرا لایق و سزاست که لحاظ
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @business; financial; property matters, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @praise and encouragement
